title: Degreeworks Course Substitution, Exception, and Waivers
content:
Degreeworks Course Substitution, Exception, and Waivers
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use. An advisor, chairperson, or dean may initiate a substitution, exception, or waiver from the Smartsheet dashboard.

---

QUICK LINKS
- Academic Catalog
- Academic Calendar
- Advisor Dashboard
- CS Degreeworks Dashboard
- Substitution/Exception & Waiver Form

---

STEP 1: ENTER YOUR FULL NAME
Enter your full name as the person initiating the request.

---

STEP 2: ENTER STUDENT INFORMATION
Enter the student's 8-digit ID number along with their first and last name. You can find the student's ID via Faculty Self Service grade entry in Websis.

---

STEP 3: ENTER MAJOR AND CLASSIFICATION
Enter the student's major and classification:
- Freshman
- Sophomore
- Junior
- Senior

If the student is graduating this semester, check the "Graduation Applicant" box.

---

STEP 4: SELECT ADJUSTMENT TYPE

Substitution/Exception: Adjusts course requirements. For example, substituting ENGL 101 with SPCH 115 to satisfy a requirement.

Waiver: Adjusts a policy requirement. For example, waiving the 30-hour rule or the 7-year rule for a student.

---

STEP 5: ENTER SEMESTER AND YEAR
Enter the semester and year for which the adjustment should take effect.

---

FOR SUBSTITUTIONS
Old Course: Enter the course subject and number of the course to be replaced (the original requirement).
Requested Course: Enter the course subject and number of the course being substituted in.

---

FOR WAIVERS
Course/Item to be Waived: Enter the specific course or policy item to be waived.
Documentation Required: You must attach supporting documentation justifying the waiver.

---

STEP 6: ATTACH DOCUMENTATION AND ENTER COMMENTS
Attach any supporting documentation and enter comments explaining the reason for the substitution, exception, or waiver.

---

NOTIFICATION AND STATUS
You will receive an email notification once the request has been approved and applied. You can check the status of your request on the dashboard at any time.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Degreeworks Substitution Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/11kWv3UIqp7rpGSWrcYxz6533cq4SE1Xl/view)
